title: Filipino Sweet Potato Stir-Fry
description: A sweet and savory Filipino-inspired stir-fry dish made with tender sweet potatoes, a hint of sweetness, and the crunch of potatoes.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced sweet potatoes and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the diced potato and stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the sauce mixture over the sweet potatoes and potato, and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
